notable_excerpts: We are a fully integrated organization, vertically integrated. So we have our own lens-making plant. We have two plants in fact, one at Bengaluru and one at Kolkata. And from a volume standpoint, almost 90% of the volumes what we sell at retail, very happy to state, is locally produced in our factory.

We unleashed a very powerful gold exchange campaign, not just an offer. Offer was, of course, there, which was a never before offer. But we provided a very strong emotional hook to customers saying how when you exchange gold or unlock your lockers, it's good for you and good for the country using Sachin as the spokesperson.

By adequately staffing that company, adequately creating the right capability for the Board which manages -- which governs TEAL, we have created a kind of planetary system, if you will, which maximizes the opportunity for TEAL.

chain_of_thought: The earnings call provided limited information on environmental initiatives, focusing more on supply chain integration and local production. Social aspects were highlighted through community engagement and customer satisfaction initiatives, particularly the gold exchange campaign. Governance was touched upon with mentions of board capability and strategic governance, but lacked depth in areas like ethics and transparency.
strengths: Local production and supply chain integration
